designSystem.name: Lahzo Internal Design System
designSystem.theme: Lahzo — Light Theme (set via data-theme on <html>)
designSystem.note: Code-only reference. Desktop internal tools. Every UI element uses a daisyUI component configured with the Lahzo theme classes, a defined text-* utility, and the spacing/sizing/icon scales. Three tiers: canonical components + specified essentials (Card/Input/Select/Textarea/Badge/Avatar/Tooltip) use the specs here; anything else uses base daisyUI + the Lahzo theme, no bespoke CSS. Dark mode is out of scope. Full prose specs live in rules/design-system-rules.md; build recipes in reference/playbooks.md.

Solid.note: default to neutral/primary/secondary; success+error are edge-case only

Outline.note: opt-in ONLY when the user explicitly asks; neutral/success/error only

Link.note: base-content text + underline + ph-arrow-square-out icon adjacent
Link.underline: text only; icon-links wrap text in a <span> (theme uses :has() so the icon is never underlined)

Button.iconButton: btn-ghost btn-square (square hit/hover area: 40/32/24 for md/sm/xs) + aria-label; tooltip when meaning isn't obvious
Button.ghostStates: transparent at rest; hover = base-content 10%; pressed = base-content 20% (theme-provided)

hierarchy.primary: btn-primary — single main action per surface
hierarchy.secondary: btn-secondary — DEFAULT for any labeled non-primary action. Includes: page toolbar actions (Refresh, Queue, Export, New), sidebar filter chips (Flagged, Spot check), sort buttons (Newest), Cancel/Back/Skip, filter Clear, dialog secondaries. If you're about to use btn-ghost on a labeled button, use btn-secondary instead.
hierarchy.neutralSolid: btn-neutral — high-emphasis dark when not the primary
hierarchy.tertiary: btn-ghost — ONLY for icon-only utility controls (close ph-x, copy, kebab, row-level icons). Never for a labeled action of any weight.
hierarchy.edgeCase: btn-success/btn-error — only when success/danger semantics genuinely matter

Navbar.structure: Brand (Lahzo logo + 1.5px divider + tool name) | Tabs | flex-1 spacer | Right (search + avatar)

tabStyles.tabs-box: default — active tab neutral fill + white text

logo.header: assets/lahzo-wordmark-navy.svg via — ALWAYS 78x16, never scaled
logo.currentColor: assets/lahzo-wordmark.svg / lahzo-mark.svg — inline to inherit text color (e.g. white on a dark footer)

Navbar.forbidden: no action buttons (Refresh, Save, Archive, Export, icon-action toolbars), no status text/counters/taglines/widgets — page-level actions go into a page toolbar, not the header
Navbar.tabAlignment: vertically centered: text at navbar center; underline (active tab border-bottom) sits on the navbar's 1.5px bottom border, continuous with the header separator

canonicalRecipe.nav: navbar bg-base-100 h-16 px-6 gap-6 shrink-0 py-0 (default items-center)
canonicalRecipe.brand: flex items-center gap-4 shrink-0 — wordmark img 78x16, 1.5px divider, font-display text-2xl tool name
canonicalRecipe.tablist: tabs tabs-border self-stretch — fills navbar height
canonicalRecipe.tabAnchor: tab text-button h-full + data-screen=… ; active gets tab-active
canonicalRecipe.separator: <div class='h-[1.5px] bg-base-300 shrink-0'> right under the navbar continues the line

Navbar.actionsForbidden: no Refresh/Save/Archive/Export/etc. in the header — page-level actions go in a page toolbar below

banned: bare tabs without a style class

Breadcrumbs.currentItem: base-content full opacity, not a link

Menu.note: Sidebar/nav list — distinct from the dropdown popup menu
Menu.title: .menu-title (text-caption, 0.6 opacity)

Alert.rule: always include an icon matching the variant; never color-only state

Table.border: 1.5px base-300 on table and below header

typography.label: text-button (Instrument Sans Medium 14/1.2, full base-content)
typography.helper/validation: text-caption (IBM Plex Mono Regular 12/1.5); hint base-content@0.8, error=error, success=success

Select.label: text-label above
Select.note: fixed option set; use Dropdown+Menu when items need icons/badges/actions

Textarea.label: text-label above
Textarea.note: set default height via rows, not off-scale fixed height

Badge.rule: status pairs color with the word (+icon if needed), never color alone; not a button

Avatar.note: navbar avatar placeholder; never inside chat bubbles

Tooltip.rule: hint only — not a substitute for a visible label; still set aria-label on icon-only controls

Scrollbar.note: daisyUI has no scrollbar component; do not restyle per component

Footer.type: custom Lahzo component (not standard daisyUI), like Navbar
Footer.container: border-t-[1.5px] border-base-300 bg-base-100, square corners, flat
Footer.logo: Lahzo mark (lahzo-mark-navy.svg, 20x28) — mark belongs in footers, wordmark in header

variants.simple: ~64px row: mark left, flex spacer, copyright right (text-caption)
variants.withLinks: items-start justify-between: left mark + address (text-caption); right link columns (gap-12), each text-h3 title over gap-3 btn-link stack
variants.withLinksAndSearch: variant 2 + a magnifier search Input (~280px, text-body) as the last right-cluster item

Footer.notes: footer links use btn-link standalone (compact underlined text links); footer is optional and best on scrollable/page screens, not full-height app shells
Footer.whenToInclude: OPT-IN (opposite of navbar): only when the user explicitly asks, a footer is in the wireframe/reference, or one already exists in the project. Never add by default.

textUtilities.text-button: Instrument Sans Medium 14 / 120% — button labels, nav tabs
textUtilities.text-label: IBM Plex Mono Medium 12 / 150% — UI labels (sentence-case)
textUtilities.btn-link: Instrument Sans Medium 14 / 120% / UNDERLINE / base-content — links only

accessibility.tintedSurfaceText: use base-content (never same-family tinted text on a tinted bg)
accessibility.stateIndicators: never color-alone — pair with icon + text

selectionTint: primary #63A8CC @ 40% (color-mix oklab) + base-content text — selected rows, menu-active, agent chat bubble
